title: synaedrys pachyphylla
intro: Synaedrys pachyphylla, also known as the Taiwan mahonia, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Synaedrys. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Synaedrys pachyphylla include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
